name: ai_marketing_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_skills capability.

prompts.name: growth_experiment_setup
prompts.template: Design a growth experiment for {campaign_name} targeting {audience} with goals {goals_list}.
prompts.use_case: Running growth experiments to validate marketing hypotheses and improve ROI

prompts.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompts.template: Suggest SEO improvements for the content related to {topic} focusing on keywords {keywords}.
prompts.use_case: Automating sales pipeline management to increase efficiency and track leads

prompts.name: outbound_message_generator
prompts.template: Create a personalized outbound email message for {contact_name} from {company_name} about {product_or_service}.
prompts.use_case: Generating SEO-friendly content to boost organic traffic

prompts.name: sales_pipeline_update
prompts.template: Update the sales pipeline status for lead {lead_name} with current stage {stage} and next steps {next_steps}.
prompts.use_case: Executing outbound marketing campaigns with personalized AI-driven messaging

prompts.name: finance_automation_task
prompts.template: Automate the marketing finance process for budget {budget_amount} and track ROI from campaigns {campaign_list}.
prompts.use_case: Automating finance-related marketing processes including budget tracking and ROI analysis
